title: De mujer a mujer
overview: Elsa  and her married friend Miranda become jealous and violent toward each other as they compete for the sexual affection of the hunk Sergio. Elsa takes comfort in the arms of Miranda's husband Eloy  after Sergio and Miranda run away together. Their lustful desires lead to tragedy in this erotic drama.
